news.headline: Codere Online (Nasdaq: CDRO) gets Nasdaq listing extension until May 12, issues Q4 2024 earnings on Feb 20.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Codere Online Luxembourg, S.A. (Nasdaq: CDRO / CDROW), a prominent online gaming operator in Spain and Latin America, disclosed that the Nasdaq Hearings Panel has approved their plea to maintain their listing on Nasdaq. The Panel directed the company to submit its 2023 Annual Report by May 12, 2025. Failure to meet this deadline could jeopardize their listing status.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds rate 4.33% February 12th vs 4.33% February 11th.
Mike Lindell Media Corp appoints former MLB player Rob Rogers to board, joining Lindell, Giuliani, amid controversy.
news.summary: Entrepreneur Rob Rogers has recently become a member of the Board of Directors at FrankSpeech Network, Inc., also recognized as Mike Lindell Media Corp. Alongside Mike Lindell and Rudy Giuliani, Rogers brings his expertise as the Energy Shot Mogul to the company. This development adds another prominent figure to the leadership team, consolidating the board with notable individuals.

news.headline: New Trump tariffs expected; Robinhood, Reddit, Dutch Bros report high earnings. Dow Jones awaits impact.
news.summary: The President of the United States, Donald Trump, announced on Thursday that he plans to implement increased tariffs. Stocks of companies such as Robinhood, Reddit, and Dutch Bros are experiencing significant fluctuations in earnings. Dow Jones Futures are currently anticipating the effects of these new tariffs, with these three companies leading the way in terms of earnings movement.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises on surprise data: inflation & jobless claims. Reddit stock plunges on earnings amid market movements.
news.summary: On Thursday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase following unexpected inflation data and weekly jobless claims. Conversely, Reddit stock took a hit due to disappointing earnings.

news.headline: Notable launches new partner program enabling experts to build and implement AI solutions in healthcare, driving faster automation.
news.summary: In San Mateo, California, a recent initiative has been launched to enable third-party developers, consultancies, and software firms to create and profit from AI solutions using Notable's Flow Builder. This collaboration aims to assist clients in adopting automation at a quicker and more scalable rate, in addition to opening up potential new revenue streams. This opportunity allows for greater innovation and efficiency in utilizing AI technology.

news.headline: Expert Tannebaum deems Trump's talks offer to Putin 'premature'.
Stryve Foods (OTC: SNAX) secures distribution with Kroger, Key Foods, and other retailers. Important partnerships.
news.summary: Stryve Foods, Inc., a company listed under the ticker symbol SNAX on the Over-The-Counter exchange, has recently publicized significant victories in its distribution network. The company has managed to secure distribution deals with major retailers such as Kroger, Key Foods, and additional prominent names in the industry. This strategic move will notably enhance the accessibility and presence of Stryve's products in the market, potentially leading to increased sales and brand visibility.

news.headline: Bare Dermatology opens 9th location in Dallas, TX at 9201 N. Central Expressway, Ste 120, led by Dr. Ritu Swali.
news.summary: In Dallas on February 13, 2025, Bare Dermatology unveiled its ninth branch situated at 9201 N. Central Expressway, Ste 120, Dallas, TX. Renowned for its dedication to superior healthcare services and quick service, Bare Dermatology offers top-notch skincare solutions.

news.headline: FIBRAMQ reported strong Q4 2024 results: Industrial portfolio up 6.7% in USD, Retail up 4.3% in MXN, 30.4m sq. ft GLA, 93.3% occupancy.
news.summary: In Mexico City, FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) (BMV: FIBRAMQ12) has released its financial and operational outcomes for the Q4 of 2024. Key figures from the fourth quarter of 2024 include a robust performance in the same-store NOI portfolio, with a 6.7% increase in the Industrial portfolio (in US Dollars, YoY) and a 4.3% rise in the Retail portfolio (in Mexican Pesos, YoY). The Industrial portfolio boasted a Leased GLA of 30.4 million square feet, remaining stable in both QoQ and YoY measurements. Additionally, the Retail portfolio achieved a closing occupancy rate of 93.3%, maintaining consistency in QoQ levels and experiencing a 130 basis point increase.

news.headline: SmokeSlam BBQ showdown closed team registration for 73 teams; opens waitlist. Memphis Mayor joins for SmokeSlam Bootcamp.
news.summary: The Mayor's Office in Memphis has collaborated with Melissa Cookston's World Junior BBQ League to organize the SmokeSlam Bootcamp. The event is scheduled to take place in Memphis, Tennessee on February 13, 2025. The SmokeSlam, recognized as 'The World's Ultimate BBQ Showdown,' has confirmed the participation of 73 teams after closing registration. These teams will be competing in the upcoming event.

news.headline: NYSE provides daily pre-market updates for traders, including market insights, delivered by Kristen Scholer.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) introduced a daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Stay informed with today's NYSE Pre-market update, providing valuable market insights prior to the start of trading. Kristen Scholer presents the pre-market update, giving a comprehensive overview of the early trading activity. Don't miss out on this essential update to make informed decisions before the market opens.

news.headline: Circuit raises $17M in Series B financing to scale tech-driven shared mobility in response to urban congestion.
news.summary: In light of increasing congestion, parking struggles, and access difficulties, cities are now faced with a growing need for sustainable, technology-driven solutions. Circuit's last-mile shuttle systems have emerged as a response to these challenges, offering efficient and affordable microtransit services to help address these pressing urban issues. This innovative approach comes as demand for such solutions hits record highs, reflecting a shift towards more sustainable and tech-savvy urban transportation options.

news.headline: Tether invests in Zengo Wallet to drive stablecoin adoption worldwide, improving self-custody solutions.
news.summary: Tether has recently revealed a significant investment in Zengo Wallet, with the goal of improving self-custody methods and promoting the global use of stablecoins. This move underscores Tether's dedication to ensuring the secure management of digital assets. This strategic partnership is geared towards driving the adoption of stablecoins worldwide, emphasizing the importance of safe storage solutions in the ever-evolving crypto landscape.

news.headline: Mother hopes troubled teen's donated organs save lives in novel set in transplant medicine world.
news.summary: In Park City, Utah, on February 13, 2025, bestselling author Beverly Hurwitz released her latest novel focusing on transplant medicine. The story follows a mother who, after losing her troubled teen in a car accident, makes the difficult decision to donate her child's organs in the hopes of saving other lives. The narrative delves into the emotional journey of organ donation and explores the profound impact it has on individuals and families. The novel highlights the importance of organ donation and sheds light on the complexities of the transplant process. Hurwitz's book has received praise for its compelling storytelling and touching portrayal of this subject.

news.headline: The Joint Chiropractic ranked No. 1 in chiropractic franchises, jumping 29 spots on Franchise 500 ranking. #Entrepreneur
news.summary: The Joint Corp. (NASDAQ: JYNT) based in Scottsdale, Arizona, climbed an impressive 29 spots on the Franchise 500 ranking. This growth reflects its position as the leading franchise in chiropractic services, according to Entrepreneur. The Joint Corp., known for its The Joint Chiropractic® network, has further solidified its status as the nation's largest provider of chiropractic care. The achievement was announced on Feb. 13, 2025.

news.headline: Mango AI animates static pet photos, allowing users to transform them into talking animals, catering to the rising demand for personalized content.
news.summary: The growing popularity of personalized content has led to an increased need for innovative methods to enhance images. Mango AI, a creation of Mango Animate, is meeting this demand by offering a unique capability to animate photos. With this tool, users can animate still pictures of animals, creating a dynamic and interactive experience. By uploading pet photos onto the platform, users can bring their furry friends to life, appealing to a wide audience. This feature demonstrates the rising interest in interactive content, with Mango AI driving engagement through its unique offerings.

news.headline: Founder of Novae, Reco M. McCambry, releases book "Fintech is the Future," showcasing financial technology and education.
news.summary: This weekend, the newest book by Reco M. McCambry, the entrepreneur behind the successful Inc 5000 company Novae, will be released in Conyers, Georgia. Titled "Fintech is the Future," the book delves into the realms of financial technology and education. As the founder of Novae, McCambry presents insights on these subjects to readers, offering a glimpse into the potential they hold.

news.headline: Tether may need to sell Bitcoin to comply with US laws, JPMorgan warns, due to proposed legislation like the STABLE and GENIUS Acts.
news.summary: A recent report suggests that Tether (crypto symbol: USDT) may need to adjust its asset reserves, which could lead to the selling of some of its holdings such as Bitcoin (crypto symbol: BTC), as per analysts at JPMorgan. This move has the potential to significantly impact the cryptocurrency market dynamics, causing a ripple effect. The reason behind this potential restructuring is linked to new legislative proposals being reviewed in Congress. The House and Senate are currently examining two bills known as the STABLE Act and the GENIUS Act, aimed at introducing tighter regulations. The outcome of these proposed changes could alter the landscape for Tether and its assets. For further details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump news conference on reciprocal tariffs today, 1:00 PM ET.
Alpha Modus (AMOD) plans AI-driven retail expansion via CashX for targeted $75M annual ad revenue.
High inflation worries grow as US Producer Price Index rose to 3.5% in Jan 2025, clouding hopes for Fed interest rate cut.
news.summary: In January 2025, U.S. producers faced significant price pressures leading to concerns about businesses either absorbing increased costs or passing them on to consumers, impacting hopes for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts. The Producer Price Index rose by 3.5% year over year, higher than December's 3.3% and surpassing the forecasted 3.2%. This surge marks the highest annual reading since February 2023, indicating persistent inflation. On a monthly basis, PPI increased by 0.4%, lower than December's 0.5% but exceeding the projected 0.3%. This unexpectedly high PPI coincides with a stronger-than-expected Consumer Price Index report.

news.headline: Hemp Beverage Alliance to host Hemp Beverage Expo in Atlanta on July 9-11, 2025, in partnership with Jage Media.
news.summary: A trade association representing the growing hemp beverage sector, the Hemp Beverage Alliance, disclosed its intention to organize the Hemp Beverage Expo from July 9 to July 11 in Atlanta, Georgia. The event, held in collaboration with Jage Media, seeks to bring together industry professionals, showcasing the latest innovations in the sector and promoting networking opportunities for the participants.

news.headline: Broad Street Development hires Matt Sobel and Ben Kahan to acquire $2B in assets, expanding investment capabilities.
news.summary: In an exciting development, prominent investor and developer Broad Street Development (BSD) is marking its 20th anniversary by announcing the addition of two new senior executives to its team. Matt Sobel and Ben Kahan are now part of the expanding investment capabilities at BSD. This move comes at a significant time for the company, showcasing its commitment to growth and innovation. With these new appointments, BSD is poised to strengthen its position in the market and drive forward its strategic objectives.

news.headline: Bipartisan bill aims to protect utilities and ratepayers from PFAS costs; supported by Water Environment Federation.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Washington, the Water Environment Federation (WEF) announced their firm endorsement for the reintroduction of the Water Systems PFAS Liability Protection Act. Sponsored by Representatives Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (D-WA) and Celeste Maloy (R-UT), the bipartisan bill seeks to provide liability protection to water systems dealing with per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS).

news.headline: Deere Q1 2025: Sales down 30% to $8.51B, beating $7.70B consensus. Net sales $6.809B. EPS $3.19, beating $3.14.
news.summary: Deere & Co (NYSE: DE) announced a 30% year-over-year decrease in net sales and revenue for the first quarter of 2025, totaling $8.51 billion, which surpassed the anticipated $7.70 billion. Specifically, net sales amounted to $6.809 billion for the quarter, a significant decline from the $10.486 billion recorded in 2024. The company reported an earnings per share (EPS) of $3.19, down from $6.23 in the previous year, surpassing the expected $3.14. Within its various segments, Production & Precision Agriculture net sales decreased by 37% year-over-year to $3.067 billion, while Small Agriculture & Turf net sales saw a 28% decline to $1.748 billion. Furthermore, Construction & Forestry revenue dropped by 38% to $1.994 billion. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: CVS Health reported Q4 sales of $97.71B, exceeding consensus of $97.19B. Adjusted EPS at $1.19 ($2.12 prior year) beat consensus $0.93. Analysts raise forecasts.
news.summary: CVS Health Corp (NYSE:CVS) announced positive results for the fourth quarter. The company achieved sales of $97.71 billion, surpassing the expected $97.19 billion. Despite a decrease in adjusted EPS from $2.12 to $1.19 compared to the previous year, the figure exceeded the estimated $0.93. The decline was mainly attributed to challenges in the Health Care Benefits segment, influenced by ongoing utilization pressure and the adverse effects of the Company’s Medicare Advantage star ratings for the 2024 payment year. CVS emphasized its capacity to provide a streamlined, interconnected experience that enhances efficiency, reduces costs, and promotes well-being. The Pharmacy and Consumer Wellness division experienced growth, underscoring the success in key areas of the business.

news.headline: Yemen's Houthis group leader: We will carry attacks if US' Trump follows through with his warning to Hamas.
Collab of ChainOperaAI & Render Network delves into Decentralized AI, Web3, NFTs for AI, with emphasis on innovation and strategic partnership.
news.summary: Discover the recent partnership between ChainOperaAI and Render Network, emphasizing the joint efforts in advancing decentralized AI technology, integrating Web3 capabilities, and utilizing NFTs to enhance AI agents' functionality. This collaboration aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to drive innovation in the field. Stay updated on this exciting venture for more details.

news.headline: 2025 Ford Bronco now on sale at Bickford Ford in Snohomish, Washington. Customers can test drive and purchase. #2025FordBronco #BickfordFord
news.summary: Bickford Ford in Snohomish, Washington, is now offering customers the opportunity to test drive and buy the new 2025 Ford Bronco. The latest model has generated significant interest and is now on sale at the dealership. This announcement was made on February 13, 2025. The dealership invites customers to experience the rugged qualities of the Ford Bronco firsthand.

news.headline: Crispy Green's top-selling freeze-dried fruit snack now in nationwide Whole Foods Market stores.
news.summary: Crispy Green®, based in FAIRFIELD, N.J., revealed on Feb. 13, 2025, that their popular freeze-dried fruit snack, Crispy Fruit™, is now available in convenient 4-PACKS. The company, known for producing the top-selling freeze-dried fruit snack in the U.S., introduced this new packaging for their two best-selling Crispy Fruit snacks. Families seeking a delicious and nutritious snack option will appreciate these convenient packs, which aim to cater to the needs of active households.

news.headline: Sprinturf's Healthy Spaces Council meeting in Chattanooga, TN gathers architects and professionals to advance recreation and play design.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Daniel Island, South Carolina, a group of prominent architects and professionals specializing in recreation and play area design gathered at the Healthy Spaces Council meeting. The conference took place in Chattanooga, TN and was organized by Sprinturf, a subsidiary of PlayCore. The event aimed to discuss innovative approaches to creating engaging play spaces.

news.headline: Pitaya Foods launches new organic Smoothie Pops on 1,300+ Kroger shelves nationwide, crafted with half a serving of fruit per pop and no added sugar.
news.summary: Pitaya Foods has launched Smoothie Pops that contain half a serving of fruit per pop and are free from added sugars. These pops are designed to cater to active, growing kids and families who prioritize health. The company, based in San Diego, made the official announcement on February 13, 2025. The initiative aims to provide a nutritious and delicious snack option.

news.headline: China's iFlyTek to finish a new domestic AI model in March.
Mink Ventures finds nickel-copper-cobalt mineralization at Warren, with disseminated and semi-massive sulphides in every hole.
news.summary: Disseminated and semi-massive sulphides were found in all drill holes at the Mink site, confirming the accuracy of geophysical data. This significant discovery indicates a high likelihood of valuable mineral deposits in the area.

news.headline: Leidos Holdings' subsidiary starts tender offer for 3.625% Senior Notes due 2025.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia on February 13, 2025, Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) revealed that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Leidos, Inc., has initiated a Tender Offer to buy back all of its existing 3.625% Senior Notes due in 2025 for cash.

news.headline: Celebrating 30 yrs of surrogacy & egg donation services by CCI in Mission Viejo, Calif., benefiting families nationwide.
news.summary: Celebrating its 30th anniversary, Creative Conception, Inc. (CCI) based in Mission Viejo, California, has been dedicated to offering surrogacy and egg donation services nationwide. Since its establishment in 1995, CCI has been a leading provider in the industry, guiding families through the process.

news.headline: NSBE celebrates 50th anniversary at annual convention in Chicago with expected record-breaking attendance amid federal DEI pushback.
news.summary: With diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) initiatives encountering resistance from the federal government, the National Society of Black Engineers® (NSBE®) foresees a surge in attendance for its upcoming event in Chicago. The organization, headquartered in Alexandria, Virginia, is anticipating a record-breaking number of participants at the event scheduled for February 13, 2025. NSBE, known as one of the leading student-led organizations in the country, is enthusiastic about the increasing interest in the event amidst the current challenges to DEI efforts nationwide.

news.headline: New Pickleball Kingdom facility to open in Tigard, OR at 16800 SW 72nd Ave, covering 42,000 sq ft with 13 courts.
news.summary: The world's largest indoor pickleball entity, Pickleball Kingdom, is set to open a new facility in Tigard, Oregon at 16800 SW 72nd Ave. The 42,000-square-foot complex will include 13...

news.headline: TP-Link chooses MaxVal's Symphony for IP portfolio management. MaxVal announced on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: A major provider of networking solutions has selected Symphony for improved transparency and reporting functions. The announcement was made on February 13, 2025, in Los Altos, California. MaxVal Group, Inc. ("MaxVal"), specializing in intellectual property (IP) management solutions, reported the news.

news.headline: Express Employment Professionals owners in Tennessee named 2024 Franchisees of the Year with eight offices.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Oklahoma City, Susan and Ronnie Morris, franchise owners of eight Express Employment Professionals offices in Tennessee, were named the 2024 Franchisees of the Year by the International Franchise Association (IFA). This recognition was given at the 65th IFA Annual...

Yemen's Houthis will attack with missiles and drones, and target vessels if the plan to displace Palestinians was forced - Group Leader.
InVastor Coin launched to make cryptocurrency accessible globally, bridging businesses and crypto economy.
news.summary: In the city of Brockton in Massachusetts, on February 13, 2025, a new cryptocurrency called InVastor Coin was introduced. Its goal is to democratize the use of digital currency for all individuals globally. InVastor Coin was unveiled recently and is already making waves by serving as a connector linking various platforms.

news.headline: Ginger Cinnamon Cookie Bites by Every Body Eat® is a NEXTY Award finalist at Expo West 2025, known for clean and tasty cookies.
news.summary: In a breakthrough for clean and delicious treats, Ginger Cinnamon Cookie Bites from Every Body Eat® in EVANSTON, Ill. have clinched a spot as a finalist for a prestigious NEXTY Award at Natural Products Expo West 2025. Known as a top accolade for inventive products in the industry, this nomination highlights the exceptional quality and innovation of these cookies.

news.headline: Central Bark® is opening its first Arizona location in Phoenix in spring 2025, bringing enrichment dog daycare services to the area.
news.summary: In spring 2025, a new Central Bark® location is set to open in Paradise Valley, Arizona. This marks the first Arizona location for the premier whole dog care franchise. The facility will be situated in the Phoenix area and is expected to offer industry-leading services.

news.headline: Wholesale inflation shows strong persistence with PPI's significant increase in January.
NightOwl Espresso Martini Partners with Breakthru Beverage for Distribution in Florida, Launching in 105 ABC Fine Wine & Spirits Stores
news.summary: In Miami on February 13, 2025, NightOwl Espresso Martini revealed an exciting development with Breakthru Beverage Florida, signifying a major step forward in the brand's growth. Through this partnership, NightOwl will shift from self-distribution to joining forces with a significant distributor.

news.headline: Oil Condition Monitoring Market expected to reach $2.81 Bn by 2033, focusing on real-time sensing tech, remote monitoring, and digital transformation - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Oil Condition Monitoring Market Opportunities and Strategies to 2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report delves into the oil condition monitoring market, analyzing the periods of 2018-2023 (historic) and 2023-2028 (forecast), with projections up to 2033. It assesses the market on a regional basis, including key economies within each region. The global oil condition monitoring market was valued at almost $X.

news.headline: US wholesale inflation in January 2025 surpasses expectations, driven by increased food and energy prices.
news.summary: In recent statistics, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached its lowest point in five years, dropping to 4.2%. This decline represents a significant decrease of 1.5% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the economy has shown strong growth with a GDP increase of 3.8% in the last quarter. These positive indicators point towards a recovering job market and a strengthening economy. This news comes as a welcome relief to many individuals and businesses struggling in the aftermath of the recent economic downturn.
